title: Round Top-3 Sum
note: For each round, the sum of its top 3 results. Ranking lists the rounds with the smallest sum; History shows how the all-time record progressed. Toggle Single/Average, Ranking/History, and whether to count only final rounds.
noteZh: 每个轮次前三名成绩之和。排名列出总和最小的轮次;历史展示全历史纪录随时间的演进。可切换 单次/平均、排名/历史、以及是否只看决赛轮次。
